expectations.text: Output directory contains an interview-prep .md file
Output directory contains an interview-prep .docx file
Markdown body is primarily in German (contains typical German words like 'Frage', 'Antwort', 'Unternehmen')
Contains a section header matching 'Wahrscheinliche Fragen' or equivalent (Frage/F:)
Contains a section with talking points/highlights (Highlights/Gesprächs-/Stärken)
Contains a section with questions to ask the company (Fragen an das Unternehmen/Rückfragen)
At least 10 distinct interview questions are listed
Q&A entries follow the skill's F:/A-Skizze:/Verbindung: pattern (at least 5 entries conform)
Does not use 'konzernweit'/'unternehmensweit' language for Lutz's ISMS scope
If DB Systel is mentioned, framed as 'IT-Partner der Deutschen Bahn' (not Infrastrukturdienstleister)
Content is tailored to SIEM role (mentions SIEM, Use Cases, Alerting, SOC, or similar role-specific terms)
Section 4 contains questions that reference the specific company/role (not generic)
